phonetic: d瑟藞str瑟bju藧t瑟d; 藞d瑟str瑟bju藧t瑟d
examples: Make sure that your weight is evenly distributed.
The money was distributed among schools in the area.
Higher education is unequally distributed across social classes.
The queues stretched to security checkpoints where those holding the 25, 000 tickets distributed for the ceremony.
So, when WPSX took the plunge into SFNs, it opted for option two, distributed transmission.
